properties.name: text
properties.value:
Welcome to Nightscapes!
Use your mouse to explore.

properties.value:
Click on an enemy
to select it
and see its stats

properties.name: text
properties.value:
With an enemy targeted
click it again to approch
and attack when close

properties.value:
Be careful when you're walking around
not all mobs are as passive as those blobs

properties.name: text
properties.value:
